title: Armpow 2000 Pack Black Cable Ties Assorted Sizes Zip tie 100/150/200/250/300mm 40LBS Heavy Duty Tie Wraps Assorted Plastic Wire Ties Nylon 66 Plastic Ties for Indoor and Outdoor
features: 【Packages include】2000 pcs cable ties (100mm 500pcs , 150mm 500pcs , 200mm 500pcs , 250 300 pcs ,300mm 200 pcs). Different sizes of cable ties basically meet your daily or working needs.
【High Quality】 Upgrade Armpow zip tie is made of industrial strength PA-66 nylon, durable, weatherproof, and can be used in temperatures ranges from -35℃ to 85℃

【Self-Locking Desgin】Self-Locking Zip Ties adopt humanized anti-return design, the tooth grooves are alternately overlapped to reach the locking position, and the teeth are not returned while fixing the self-locking, which can better fix the thing.

【Multiple uses】The cable tie can be used in organizing cables, Securing a bike, Gardening, Replacing broken straps, popular with decorators, designers and engineers, recommended for outdoor or indoor use
【100% Warranty】We offer a lifetime guarantee and a 30-day refund/return policy. If you have any questions, please contact us, we will help you solve the problem as soon as possible.
description: Product Description Material:Nylon 66 working temperature: -35℃~85℃ Our zip ties are made from 100% UV Resistant giving them excellent durability in harsh conditions. garden management tidying up the cables fence fixture
